description: A real-time chat platform where users register instantly, join article-linked discussion rooms, and message each other directly.

features.name: User Registration & Auth
features.description: User registration and login without email confirmation. Users provide a username, email, and password. Auth state is persisted in localStorage. No backend — credentials stored client-side via a mock auth service in src/api/auth.ts.
acceptance: Logged-in users see their username in the nav
Logout clears state and redirects to login
features.verification: Tests cover register, login, logout, and persistence

features.name: Article-Linked Chat Rooms
features.description: A list of chat rooms, each linked to an AI article (title + URL). Users browse rooms, open one, and post/read messages. Messages are persisted in localStorage per room.
acceptance: Rooms list page shows room name + linked article title
Clicking a room opens the room view with article link and message thread
At least 5 seed rooms pre-loaded with AI article links
features.verification: Tests cover room listing, message posting, and persistence

features.name: Direct Messaging
features.description: Users can send direct messages to other registered users. Conversation list shows all DM threads. Messages persist in localStorage.
acceptance: DMs list shows all existing conversations
User can start a new conversation by selecting from registered users
Send and receive messages in a thread view
Unread indicator on conversations with new messages
features.verification: Tests cover DM thread creation, message sending, and persistence

features.name: Deploy to Vercel
features.verification: vercel --prod returns a live https:// URL; URL reported to user
